name: The Library Heist
description: Ravensgate's library is a tall, narrow tower of honeyed stone, its shelves guarded by a sharp-eared archivist and a pair of sleepless clerks. The documents you seek lie in a locked cabinet on the upper gallery, and every footstep on the old oak floor carries like a drumbeat.
failureConsequence: The archivist catches you rifling through the cabinet and raises the alarm. You are escorted from the tower under guard and barred from the library until you can explain yourself.
